name: Ad Performance
query: select kpi_date, campaign_name, adset_name, ad_name, sum(spend) as spend, sum(impressions) as impressions, sum(video_views) as video_views, sum(video_25) as video_25, sum(video_50) as video_50, sum(video_75) as video_75, sum(video_100) as video_100, sum(messaging_conversations_started) as messaging_conversations_started, sum(messaging_first_reply) as messaging_first_reply, avg(cost_per_first_reply) as cost_per_first_reply from `tabMeta Marketing KPI` group by kpi_date, campaign_name, adset_name, ad_name order by kpi_date desc
